---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

## For questions

For any questions about the Peritoneal Summit — program, abstracts, registration, sponsorship, or media — please reach out to:

**Joel Zindel** (co-organizer)\
[joel.zindel@biol.ethz.ch](mailto:joel.zindel@biol.ethz.ch)

## Co-organizers

- **Erin Greaves** — Warwick Medical School
- **Sarah Herrick** — University of Manchester
- **Inge K. Herrmann** — ETH Zürich / Empa
- **Joel Zindel** — ETH Zürich · Institute of Molecular Health Sciences
